title: Bauru、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Bauru、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

BauruはSPにある人口381,706の都市です。A major railway and university city in central São Paulo, known for its namesake sandwich, the Bauru, and the Marechal Rondon highway hub.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
